case_title: NORMA KENNY VS. SANTOS LARA JR.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-27-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT LARA JR., SANTOS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KENNY, NORMA AS TO DEFENDANT LARA JR., SANTOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNY, NORMA AS TO DEFENDANT LARA JR., SANTOS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNY, NORMA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED', PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-28-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTFF. DEFENDANT SHOWED UP AFTER COURTROOM DOORS WERE CLOSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
